# Steven Chou

> Public proof chain for Steven Chou: AI-native quality systems, reverse engineering, digital twin workflows, and software engineering artifacts.

## Start here

- Site: https://stevenchouai.github.io/
- Proof chain: https://stevenchouai.github.io/proof-chain
- Digital Twin: https://stevenchouai.github.io/digital-twin
- Experience: https://stevenchouai.github.io/experience
- Blog: https://stevenchouai.github.io/blog

## High-signal technical artifacts

- Claude Code source deep dive: https://stevenchouai.github.io/blog/claude-code-source-deep-dive
- AI reshapes engineering SDLC: https://stevenchouai.github.io/blog/ai-reshapes-engineering-sdlc
- CLIProxyAPI: https://github.com/stevenchouai/CLIProxyAPI
- personalWebsite repository: https://github.com/stevenchouai/personalWebsite

## How to read this site

Use `/proof-chain` as the claim-to-artifact index, `/experience` for career context, and `/blog` for long-form reasoning. The site is maintained as a public engineering narrative system rather than a generic portfolio template.
